$comment: Inputs for Update-ShowbackReport.ps1 (AI Factory FinOps SHOWBACK). Resource NAMES are NOT hardcoded: the runbook derives Subscription + Resource Groups from these settings (same rules as infra-project.yml / CmnAIfactoryNaming.bicep) and discovers ALL project resource groups by naming pattern. Override at runtime via runbook parameters. Set -Source github|ado to read real values from .env / variables.yaml instead of this 'naming' block.

naming._comment: Concat rules from .env (root) + infra-project.yml + CmnAIfactoryNaming.bicep. Project RG = {aifactoryPrefix}{projectPrefix}project{NNN}-{locationShort}-{env}{aifactorySuffix}{projectSuffix}. Common RG = {aifactoryPrefix}{vnetResourceGroupBase}-{locationShort}-{env}{aifactorySuffix}. projectNumber is NOT used by showback (it enumerates ALL projects).

showback._comment: Showback behaviour. currency is a display label only (figures use the account billing currency). uploadToLake=true archives MD/HTML/PDF to the common data lake under aifactory-governance/showback/{env}/{yyyy/MM/dd}/. lakeContainerName mirrors the ADO variable of the same name.
